# Cristian Cruz

> Data informs decisions. People make them. I love working with both. Portfolio spanning data engineering, ML pipelines, consulting tooling, and applied research.

## Skills

- **Languages**: Python, Pandas, SQL, JavaScript, PHP, C#, HTML, CSS
- **ML / Data**: PyTorch, scikit-learn, HuggingFace, SentenceTransformers
- **Tools & Platforms**: Node.js, Fivetran, Domo, Tableau, Metabase, Quicksight, Excel, Claude Code
- **Cloud & DevOps**: GitHub, Snowflake, AWS, GCP, Docker

## Projects

- [Risa Running](https://github.com/ccristil): A personal iOS running coach — designed the data schema, built the backend API, and shipped a live app using Python, Flask, Grok, Elevenlabs, GCP, and Postgres
- [Metabase Skills](https://github.com/ccristil/metabase-skills): Claude Code skills to automate workflows born from real client needs across dozens of consulting engagements — built with Claude Code, Shell, and Metabase API
- [EdTech Privacy Audit](https://aisel.aisnet.org/amcis2025/sig_sec/sig_sec/2/): Published at AMCIS 2025 — built ETL pipelines to audit privacy practices across EdTech apps, saving 40+ hours of manual analysis; used Python, Beautiful Soup, and OpenAI API
- [BYU Police Operations System](https://github.com/ccristil): Designed a full relational data model from stakeholder conversations with police leadership, then built and documented the entire system for handoff using Data Modeling, SQLite, and C#
- [ML Real Estate Pipeline](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/15PrdCOcAKhHmHHRoCnjwcCZYT9zh4Xf1?usp=sharing): End-to-end ML pipeline predicting Utah home prices — from raw API data to model evaluation, feature engineering, and a written findings report; used Python, Pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib, and PyTorch
- [Semantic Scripture Search App](https://bom275.streamlit.app): Built a semantic search engine for scripture — trained custom NLP models to match plain language queries to relevant verses using Python, HuggingFace, Streamlit, and SentenceTransformers

## Experience

- Technical Consultant at ClearSquare (Apr 2025 - Present)
- Research Assistant at BYU IS Department (Dec 2024 - May 2025)
- Web Developer at BYU Police & Security (Apr 2024 - Apr 2025)
- Web Developer at BYU Chinese & Arabic Flagships (Aug 2023 - Apr 2024)

## Education

- GPA 3.7, MSS Scholarship Recipient (Full Ride)
- Coursework: Exploratory Data Analysis, Database Systems, Machine Learning, Data Structures & Algorithms
